title: Mastercard Transaction
description: A financial transaction record processed through the Mastercard network, capturing the full lifecycle from authorization through settlement. Used across fraud detection, analytics, and reconciliation services.

transactionId.description: Unique identifier for the transaction, generated using UUID logic.

transactionIdentifiers.description: One or more identifiers used to locate the transaction in the Mastercard Data Warehouse.

cardNumber.description: Primary Account Number (PAN) used in the transaction. Must pass Luhn algorithm validation.

cardProductCode.description: Three-character code identifying the type of card used in the transaction (e.g., MSI for Mastercard Standard, MWE for World Elite).

transactionAmount.description: Transaction amount at the merchant location without decimal separators. Implied decimals depend on the currency.

transactionCurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 numeric currency code for the transaction amount.

billingAmount.description: Amount appearing on the cardholder statement in the cardholder billing currency, without decimals.

billingCurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 numeric currency code for the billing amount.

transactionDate.description: Local date at the merchant location when the transaction occurred, in YYYYMMDD format.

transactionTime.description: Local time at the merchant location when the transaction occurred, in HHmmss format.

settlementDate.description: Date the transaction was settled, in YYYYMMDD format.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the request initiation in ISO 8601 format with CST timezone offset.

icaNumber.description: Interbank Card Association (ICA) number of the issuer or acquirer initiating the request.

acquirerId.description: ICA number of the acquiring institution for the transaction.

merchantId.description: Card acceptor or merchant unique identification number assigned by the acquirer.

merchantCity.description: City in which the merchant is located.

merchantStateProvinceCode.description: State or province code where the merchant is located.

merchantCountryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the merchant is located.

merchantPostalCode.description: Postal code at the merchant location.

merchantCategoryCode.description: Four-digit ISO 18245 Merchant Category Code (MCC) classifying the merchant business type.

terminalId.description: Unique code identifying a terminal at the card acceptor location.

terminalAttendanceIndicator.description: Indicates if the card acceptor was attending the terminal at the time of the transaction.

terminalOperatingEnvironment.description: Indicates whether the terminal is attended and its location environment.

terminalCapabilityIndicator.description: Indicates the capability of the terminal to read card data.

posEntryMode.description: Point of service entry mode indicating how the card number and expiration date were captured.

accountDeviceType.description: Indicates if the account uses magnetic stripe, chip, PIN, contactless, or combinations thereof.

cardholderPresenceIndicator.description: Indicates whether the cardholder was present at the point of transaction.

cardPresenceIndicator.description: Indicates whether the card was present at the point of transaction.

catLevelIndicator.description: Cardholder Activated Terminal (CAT) level indicator showing the type of automated terminal.

cvcInvalidIndicator.description: Indicates whether the Card Verification Code (CVC) was invalid.

avsResponseCode.description: Address Verification Service (AVS) response code from the authorization request.

authResponseCode.description: Authorization response code indicating the result of the authorization request.

network.description: Payment network through which the transaction was processed.

refId.description: Reference identifier generated by the originator to link request and response messages.

memo.description: Brief description by the originator providing context for the transaction.

TransactionIdentifier.description: An identifier used to locate a transaction within the Mastercard Data Warehouse. Exactly one of the identifier types should be provided.

banknetReferenceNumber.description: Banknet Reference Number, a unique transaction identifier in the Mastercard network.

systemTraceAuditNumber.description: System Trace Audit Number used to identify transactions.

switchSerialNumber.description: Switch serial number assigned during transaction processing.
